properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iranian sites after Iran launches drones, in latest Gulf flare-up
properties.descricao: U.S. forces struck Iranian coastal radar sites on Saturday after shooting down drones launched by Iran toward the Strait of Hormuz, the U.S. military said.

properties.titulo_evento: France to test its own AI-powered battlefield command in June NATO exercise
properties.descricao: The French Army has developed its own large-language model for staff officers, called Berthier, named after Napoleon’s chief of staff.

properties.titulo_evento: Joint Chiefs head makes first official visit to post-Maduro Venezuela
properties.descricao: The visit comes five months after the high-risk U.S. military operation to remove Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro.

properties.titulo_evento: Huge fascist-era underground cisterns draw Western special forces to Italy for tunnel training
properties.descricao: After resisting 150 bombing runs by the Allies in the Second World War, the cisterns continued to be used by the Italian Air Force to hold aviation fuel.

properties.descricao: Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelenskyy condemns 'extremely vile' attack that did not lead to spike in radiation.

properties.descricao: Mediator Pakistan ramps up diplomatic efforts to end US-Iran war as Gulf countries warn of escalation.

properties.descricao: Lebanon's army chief Rodolphe Haykal left for Pakistan in a surprise visit as relentless fighting continues.

properties.descricao: Messi's recovery depends on his 'clinical and functional progress', Argentina officials say before title defence.

properties.descricao: Tensions rise as US shoots down Iranian drones over Strait of Hormuz, vital for international maritime traffic.

properties.descricao: The BBC's Russia editor saw Putin's flagship economic event overshadowed by Ukrainian drones attacks.

properties.descricao: The US military strikes Iranian drones and radar sites and Tehran says it has targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain.

properties.descricao: The feasting phenomenon run by Le Canon Français has become a hot political issue.

properties.titulo_evento: Dua Lipa and Callum Turner celebrate with guests at Sicily wedding party
properties.descricao: Newlyweds Dua Lipa and Callum Turner were seen greeting guests and celebrating at a wedding party in Palermo, Sicily, as part of a weekend of festivities following their recent London wedding.

properties.titulo_evento: Aoun tells Iran 'this is our country' as Araqchi warns of Lebanon's 'real enemy'
properties.descricao: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun accused Iran of exploiting Lebanon in its conflict with the US and Israel while calling for direct peace talks with Israel and Hezbollah’s disarmament.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran and US exchange strikes in latest threat to fragile ceasefire
properties.descricao: The US claims to have intercepted Iranian drones before launching missile strikes on what it described as "radar sites" in the south of Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Russian disinformation in Armenia 'neither a surprise nor effective', expert says

properties.titulo_evento: One killed, five wounded in terror attacks in Israel

properties.titulo_evento: Iran heads to World Cup in Mexico amid bitter visa standoff with Washington
properties.descricao: Iran's World Cup squad is expected to arrive in Mexico early Sunday under the shadow of a bitter diplomatic row between Tehran and Washington, after the United States refused to issue visas for some team support staff.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East live: Israel strikes Beirut's southern suburbs days after ceasefire agreement

properties.titulo_evento: Zelensky ignites fury by honouring Ukrainian WWII fighters who massacred Poles and Jews
properties.descricao: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky’s decision to name a military unit after a World War II-era militia infamous for massacring Poles and Jews has led to a sharp spike in tensions between Kyiv and Warsaw.

properties.titulo_evento: Pope Leo in Spain: More than a million line Madrid streets
properties.descricao: Huge crowds welcomed Pope Leo XIV to Madrid on Sunday. The pontiff is on a five-day trip around Spain during which he is meeting vulnerable people such as migrants and the homeless, and promoting "genuine human values."

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Russian drone hits nuclear-fuel storage facility

properties.descricao: Peru could soon have its ninth president in 10 years, as voters choose between Keiko Fujimori and Roberto Sanchez in a runoff election overshadowed by instability and crime.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Far-right AfD makes push in district elections
properties.descricao: Sunday's district polls are seen as a barometer for elections in eastern states in September. Meanwhile, Chancellor Merz is headed to London to discuss the Ukraine war as Putin rejects face-to-face talks. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East: Israel strikes Beirut in first since ceasefire
properties.descricao: The Israeli military said it is carrying out strikes on infrastructure it says belongs to Iran-backed Islamist group Hezbollah. This comes after it said projectiles were shot at Israel earlier today. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Armenia, once Russia's reliable ally, considers an EU future
properties.descricao: Armenians are set to vote on the country's future geopolitical direction on June 7. The election will be a test of public opinion in the long-standing Russia ally, where the population is increasingly eyeing the EU.

properties.titulo_evento: Armenia goes to polls, with Russia and EU looking on
properties.descricao: Armenians are voting in elections that pit pro-EU Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan against the pro-Russia opposition. Peace efforts with longtime foe Azerbaijan are also a main election issue.

properties.titulo_evento: North Korea says nuclear program 'absolutely nonnegotiable'

properties.titulo_evento: Germany beat USA before World Cup but injuries cast shadow

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine hits St. Petersburg again after Putin rejects talks

properties.titulo_evento: Hunger in Oleshky: Ukraine asks for evacuation
properties.descricao: The Ukrainian city of Oleshky has been occupied by Russian troops since 2022. Many residents are cut off from the outside world and living in dire conditions. Now, Kyiv wants to rescue them.
